headline: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
summary: Substack introduces a new AI detection tool for its platform. It scans posts, notes, replies, and comments for AI-generated text. The tool provides an estimate of how much content may be AI-assisted.

headline: Peak Design’s modular Field Bracket has a finder tag built-in
summary: Peak Design has launched a new modular Field Bracket for cameras. The bracket features an integrated finder tag, similar to an AirTag. This helps users locate their camera gear if lost or misplaced.

headline: Nearly every Kindle is steeply discounted at Best Buy
summary: Best Buy is offering significant discounts on most Kindle models. The Kindle Paperwhite is currently at an all-time low price of $124.99, a $35 saving. This sale is part of Best Buy's 'Black Friday in July' event.

headline: Apple’s rumored ‘Upgrade’ program brings lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads
summary: Apple is reportedly launching a new 'Apple Upgrade' program. It will offer lease-to-own pricing for iPhones, Macs, and iPads, similar to a car lease. Users will have options to upgrade early or keep/return the device at the lease's end.

headline: Metal Gear Solid Creator Hideo Kojima Quips That He Wants to Die in a Movie Theater, Just as the Film Itself Is About to Start
summary: Hideo Kojima, the renowned Metal Gear Solid creator, shared a personal sentiment. He expressed a desire to pass away in a movie theater. He hopes it happens right as a film is about to commence.

headline: 2026 Is Great For PC Gaming If You Already Have Hardware
summary: The year 2026 is projected to be a great period for PC gaming. This positive outlook primarily benefits gamers who already own robust hardware. The article suggests optimization for current-gen systems.

headline: Lara Croft’s Acrobatics Were So Important to Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis That Actress Alix Wilton Regan Started Rock-Climbing to Get Into Character
summary: Lara Croft's iconic acrobatics are central to *Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis*. Developers prioritized bringing back her signature movement style. Voice actress Alix Wilton Regan even took up rock-climbing to prepare for the role.

headline: Today's Best Deals: Switch 2 Consoles, Metal Gear Solid: Master Collection, and a Batman Omnibus
summary: The article highlights some of the best current deals for gamers. Offers include discounted Switch 2 Consoles and the *Metal Gear Solid: Master Collection*. Shoppers can also find deals on a Batman Omnibus and Adidas Gift Cards.

headline: Ann Widdecombe was hit on head 21 times with hammer, prosecutors say
summary: Former MP Ann Widdecombe was reportedly attacked in her Devon home. Prosecutors allege she was hit 21 times with a hammer during the incident. Joshua Kerry, 28, stands accused of the attack and theft of her wallet.

headline: Burnham tells cabinet to tackle living costs at first meeting
summary: New Prime Minister Andy Burnham chaired his first cabinet meeting. He instructed his cabinet to focus on tackling the soaring cost of living. This follows his announcement of a VAT cut on household electricity.

headline: Sackings, cabinet surprises and policies: Burnham's first 24 hours as PM
summary: Andy Burnham experienced a whirlwind first 24 hours as Prime Minister. His early tenure saw significant cabinet sackings and unexpected appointments. He promptly announced new policies while facing calls for a snap election.

headline: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
summary: Ukrainian President Zelensky has dismissed Oleksandr Syrskyi, the country's top army commander. The sacking comes after several days of public unrest and protests. Protests erupted following the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
